---
title: "BH-Correction"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-24"
---

# Benjamini–Hochberg procedure to control the false discovery rate


```{r BH}
pvals <- c(
  # Bug detection
  bug_exercise = 0.398,
  bug_ai = 1.61e-06,

  # Accuracy
  acc_exercise = 0.0014,
  acc_ai = 0.742,
  acc_ex_ai = 0.096,
  acc_ex_seq = 0.009, #exploratory

  # Completeness
  comp_exercise = 0.2617,
  comp_ai = 0.0386,

  # Conciseness
  conc_exercise = 0.01005,
  conc_ai = 0.00237,

  # Readability
  read_exercise = 0.2051,
  read_ai = 0.1679,
  read_ex_ai = 0.1211,

  # Time
  time_exercise = 0.0006,
  time_ai = 0.2366
)

pvals_bh <- p.adjust(pvals, method = "BH")

results <- data.frame(
  test = names(pvals),
  p_raw = pvals,
  p_bh = pvals_bh,
  significant_0.05 = pvals_bh < 0.05
)

results[order(results$p_bh), ]


```
